_guide.title: Hamplee Hamper Catalog
how_to_add_a_hamper: 1. Copy any hamper object from the 'hampers' array below.
3. Add your hamper image to the matching asset folder (e.g. asset/gourmet/).
4. Update all fields — name, price, description, highlights, image path.
6. Run: node scripts/build-hampers-data.js  — this updates the website.
7. To show on the homepage, set 'featured': true (only 4 show at a time).

hampers.name: The Epicurean Collection
hampers.description: A carefully curated selection of premium artisanal foods and beverages. This collection brings together the finest flavors from renowned producers, perfect for discerning palates and special occasions.

hampers.name: Culinary Treasures
hampers.description: Discover rare and exceptional gourmet items that elevate every dining experience. From exotic spices to premium preserves, this hamper is a journey through world-class flavors.

hampers.name: Taste of Luxury
hampers.description: Indulge in the ultimate gourmet experience with premium chocolates, fine teas, specialty coffees, and artisan treats. Each item is handpicked for its exceptional quality and taste.

hampers.name: Grand Gastronome
hampers.description: The pinnacle of gourmet gifting featuring award-winning products, limited editions, and exclusive imports. This collection represents the very best in culinary excellence.

hampers.name: Heritage Flavors
hampers.description: A celebration of timeless recipes and heritage brands that have perfected their craft over generations. This premium collection honors tradition while delivering contemporary elegance.

hampers.name: Imperial Feast
hampers.description: Our most prestigious gourmet collection featuring rare delicacies, vintage selections, and the finest products money can buy. Perfect for celebrating milestone occasions.

hampers.name: Diwali Delights
hampers.description: Illuminate festivities with this exquisite Diwali hamper featuring traditional sweets, premium dry fruits, decorative diyas, and artisan chocolates. Perfect for spreading joy and prosperity.

hampers.name: Festival of Joy
hampers.description: A vibrant celebration hamper perfect for any festive occasion. Curated with love, featuring gourmet treats, festive decorations, and premium gifting essentials.

hampers.name: New Year Elegance
hampers.description: Welcome the new year in style with this luxurious hamper featuring imported wines, gourmet snacks, celebration essentials, and elegant gift presentation.

hampers.name: Grand Celebration
hampers.tagline: For occasions that deserve the best
hampers.description: A magnificent celebration hamper designed for grand occasions. Features luxury items, premium treats, and stunning presentation that leaves a lasting impression.

hampers.name: Royal Festivities
hampers.description: Celebrate like royalty with this opulent festival hamper. Handpicked premium products, traditional elegance, and contemporary style come together in perfect harmony.

hampers.name: Heritage Celebration
hampers.description: Honor traditions while embracing luxury. This heritage hamper showcases the finest festive offerings with cultural authenticity and premium quality.

hampers.name: Eco-Luxury Hamper
hampers.tagline: Sustainable elegance for the conscious gifter
hampers.description: A thoughtfully curated sustainable hamper featuring eco-friendly luxury products. Perfect for the environmentally conscious executive who values both quality and sustainability.

hampers.name: Green Premium
hampers.description: Where luxury meets sustainability in perfect harmony. This premium collection showcases the finest eco-conscious products without compromising on elegance.

hampers.name: Earth's Treasures
hampers.tagline: Curated with care for the planet
hampers.description: Celebrate nature's finest offerings with this exquisite collection. Each item is carefully selected to honor the earth while delivering unmatched quality.

hampers.name: Conscious Choice
hampers.description: Make a statement with gifts that reflect your values. This collection embodies ethical luxury with every carefully chosen element.

hampers.name: Natural Elegance
hampers.description: Pure, natural, and exceptionally beautiful. This hamper celebrates the elegance of simplicity with premium sustainable products.

hampers.name: Green Luxe
hampers.description: Premium eco-friendly gifting at its finest. Experience luxury redefined through sustainable practices and exceptional quality.

hampers.name: Sustainable Spirit
hampers.description: Gifting with purpose and style. This collection embodies the spirit of sustainability while maintaining the highest standards of luxury.

hampers.name: Planet-Friendly Luxury
hampers.tagline: Zero compromise on sustainability or quality
hampers.description: Exceptional gifts with zero compromise on sustainability or quality. Perfect for those who demand the best for their clients and the planet.

hampers.name: Eco-Prestige
hampers.description: The finest sustainable selection for the most discerning recipients. This prestige collection represents the pinnacle of eco-luxury gifting.

hampers.name: Community Care Package
hampers.description: A meaningful hamper designed to spread joy while supporting worthy causes. Each purchase contributes to our partner NGOs working in education and healthcare.

hampers.name: Hope & Harmony
hampers.description: Share hope through thoughtful gifting. This collection directly supports child education programs while delivering premium quality to your recipients.

hampers.name: Hearts United
hampers.description: Unite hearts through compassionate gifting. Every hamper supports healthcare initiatives for underprivileged communities while bringing joy to your loved ones.

hampers.name: Change Makers Collection
hampers.tagline: Be a change maker with every gift
hampers.description: Be a change maker with every gift. This premium collection supports women empowerment programs while delivering exceptional quality and presentation.

hampers.name: Work Smart Bundle
hampers.tagline: Elevate daily work with smart essentials
hampers.description: Transform your workspace with premium essentials designed for the modern professional. Each item in this bundle is handpicked for daily utility, smart design, and the kind of quality that makes a lasting impression — all with custom branding available.
